ontology_relation_candidates.label: mercantile trading
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates an entity that engages in the buying and selling of goods and services for profit.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation captures a stable, widely applicable economic activity that can be identified across multiple documents. It is not a duplicate of any existing property in the provided seed ontology context and is reusable for different entities.
